data.title: Veteran Trader Peter Brandt Slams Ethereum, Brands It ‘Worthless Junk’
data.description:
Peter Brandt does not hold back when it comes to Ethereum, the industry’s second-largest crypto by market cap.
source: https://zycrypto.com/veteran-trader-peter-brandt-slams-ethereum-brands-it-worthless-junk/

data.title: Trump reportedly developing Monopoly-inspired crypto game
data.description:
President Donald Trump is working with longtime associate Bill Zanker to develop a crypto-based video game reportedly modeled on the structure of Monopoly, Fortune reported on April 15, citing two individuals familiar with the project. The initiative represents the latest crypto venture linked to the US president and his family.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/trump-reportedly-developing-monopoly-inspired-crypto-game/

data.title: White House Hints Tariff Revenue May Help Build US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve
data.description:
President Trump’s top crypto advisor has revealed that they may have just become key in funding the U. S. strategic Bitcoin (BTC) reserve without using taxpayer funds.
source: https://zycrypto.com/white-house-hints-tariff-revenue-may-help-build-us-strategic-bitcoin-reserve/

data.title:
$BTC Testing the bottom of the Bull Market Support Band again.

A weekly close above this would make me pretty confident that a next high timeframe leg up to new highs is on its way.

Good mid/high timeframe gauge of trend and strength.

data.title: White House Mulls Bitcoin Reserve Backed by Gold and Tariffs
data.description:
The Trump administration is exploring creative financing to build a BTC reserve; from trade tariffs to gold certificate adjustments.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/white-house-mulls-bitcoin-reserve-backed-by-gold-and-tariffs/

data.title: US Government Exploring ‘Many Creative Ways’ To Acquire Bitcoin Including Tariffs, Says White House Adviser
data.description:
A White House Advisor says that the US government is devising creative ways to accumulate more Bitcoin (BTC), including the possibility of tariffs.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/15/us-government-exploring-many-creative-ways-to-acquire-bitcoin-including-tariffs-says-white-house-adviser/
